title: Harness configuration
description: Configuration for the autonomy loop and verification gate. Tune per project; /harness-init seeds the stack-specific fields.

autonomy.description: How much rope the loop gets. Configurable from supervised to full-auto.

mode.description: supervised = pause at checkpoints for human y/n; auto = run unattended (Ralph-style) within the caps below.

maxIterations.description: Hard cap on loop iterations. The loop always stops here even if work remains.

tokenBudget.description: Approx output-token cap for the whole run; null = no cap. The loop stops when exceeded.

skipPermissions.description: Only honored when mode=auto. Passes --dangerously-skip-permissions to headless claude for true unattended runs. DANGEROUS — relies entirely on the gate + rollback + PreToolUse hook for safety. Default false.

checkpoints.description: Where supervised mode pauses for human approval (ignored in auto mode).

planApproval.description: Pause after planning, before any code.

everyNIterations.description: Pause every N iterations for a sanity check. 0 = never.

promptFile.description: Phased prompt piped into each iteration.

autoRollbackOnRed.description: git reset/stash-pop a failed iteration so the tree is never left broken.

tagOnGreen.description: git tag each green iteration (loop-N) for easy revert.

stopWhenPlanEmpty.description: Exit when fix_plan.md has no unchecked items (vs. re-plan).

gate.description: The verification gate. Each value is a shell command, or null to skip that step. /harness-init fills these from the chosen stack profile (harness/profiles/*.json). The harness defines WHEN these run; the stack profile defines WHAT they are. This is the seam that makes the harness tech-agnostic.

e2e.description: End-to-end / user-level check. Unit-green is not done.

freshContextReview.description: Require an independent review in a fresh context before merge. Doer != judge.

requireE2EEvidence.description: Require captured end-to-end evidence (screenshot/run/log), not just passing unit tests.

evaluator.description: Optional skeptical LLM evaluator (planner/generator/evaluator pattern). Worth the cost when the task exceeds what the model does reliably solo.

failBelow.description: Sprint fails if any criterion scores below this hard threshold.

stack.description: Detected/declared stack. Set by /harness-init via the stack-detect skill.

profile.description: Name of the profile in harness/profiles/, e.g. 'node'.
